case_title: RICHARD WILSON VS. JONATHAN FLESHER ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,975.00 FILED BY WILSON, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT FLESHER, JONATHAN FLESHER, TIFFANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-09-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FLESHER, JONATHAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-08-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLESHER, TIFFANY
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $8,467.47 FILED BY FLESHER, JONATHAN FLESHER, TIFFANY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WILSON, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED FEB-19-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WILSON, RICHARD

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. " PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND DEFENDANTS' CROSS-COMPLAINT ARE EACH BARRED BY APPLICABLE STATUTES OF LIMITATION. THEREFORE, THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND DEFENDANTS' CROSS-COMPLAINT ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. CROSS--DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
